name: Problem Solution
description: Problem statement followed by solution reveal
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing starting with problem scenario, transitioning to solution reveal, natural hand movement showing problem then solution, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
body_language_block: frustrated body language during problem section, relieved and satisfied body language during solution reveal, natural transition between emotions, casual authentic stance
timing_block: problem statement 3-5 seconds, solution demonstration 5-8 seconds, satisfaction reaction 2-3 seconds, clear emotional transition timing
expression_block: genuine frustration with problem, relieved and satisfied expression with solution, natural eye contact with camera during both sections, authentic emotional journey
platform_block: realistic TikTok problem-solution style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, emotional storytelling pacing, authentic relatable vibe
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
